content.en:
"It's the second stage!"

The Void Whale Overlord was not the slightest surprised to see that Ye Tian had already condensed the Infinite Bone, after all, Ye Tian had already condensed the flesh and blood last time, and he was only one step away from condensing the Infinite Bone.

With the resources on Ye Tian's body, and even the Hailou Tianjin, it was naturally easy to condense the immeasurable bones.

Moreover, he could sense that there were a lot of immeasurable bones condensed on Ye Tian's body.

However, he didn't think that Ye Tian's strength could be compared to himself.

Before, when Ye Tian was a first-stage flesh and blood body, he was able to draw with him, completely because he was in a weak state, and he had not yet condensed immeasurable blood.

Now, he has recovered from his injuries and advanced to the third stage, and after condensing immeasurable blood, his strength has skyrocketed many times.

And even if Ye Tian broke through to the second stage, the increase in strength would not be as high as his.

Of course, the Void Whale Overlord is not here to fight against Ye Tian.

"Void Whale Overlord, meet again!" Ye Tian smiled.

The Void Whale Overlord frowned and said, "Your Excellency asked me to come here to trade Hailou Tianjin, I don't need it now." "

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Void Whale Overlord, don't be in a hurry to refuse the transaction, you don't need Hailou Tianjin yet, but other overlords in the second stage definitely need Hailou Tianjin." "

"That has nothing to do with me!"

The Void Whale Overlord originally didn't want the other overlords to get too much Hailou Tianjin, otherwise the other overlords would break through to the third stage one by one and condense immeasurable blood.

At that time, he will be at the level of a weaker hegemon again.

In the future, it will be difficult for him to obtain resources in the empty galaxy.

So, he doesn't want other hegemons to grow up.

Ye Tian roughly guessed the mind of the Void Whale Overlord, so he said, "Void Whale Overlord, do you want the Void Golden Water?"

"Void Golden Water?"

When the Void Whale Overlord heard this, he immediately looked excited.

Although he had a lot of Void Silver Water, he didn't have a ball of Void Gold Water, which was a treasure that could help the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms impact the fourth-stage!

"Do you have Void Golden Water?"

The Void Whale Overlord was a little unconvinced, after all, Ye Tiancai was in the second stage of a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and it was possible to get Hailou Tianjin, but the Void Golden Water was a resource that Ye Tian could not get!

"I can get it, if you trade some Void Silverwater to me. If you can trade the Void Silver Water from other Overlords, I can provide you with the Void Gold Water. Not only can the Void Golden Water help impact the fourth stage, even if it is used to condense immeasurable blood, its effect is far superior to that of the Void Silver Water!"

Ye Tian said.

"Really?"

The Void Whale Overlord is still a little unconvinced.

"Believe it or not!" Ye Tiandao.

The Void Whale Overlord pondered for a while, and finally made a decision.

"Your Excellency, I will first use some Void Silver Water to trade some Hailou Heavenly Gold with you, and the next time you trade, I hope you can bring some Void Gold Water!"

The Void Whale Overlord proposed.

He wasn't afraid that Ye Tian would regret it, after all, he used the Void Silver Water to trade some Hailou Heavenly Gold, even if Ye Tian ran away, he would be able to use these Hailou Heavenly Gold to trade some Void Silver Water from other overlords to ensure that he would not lose money.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a full thousand pieces of Hailou Tianjin.

If it was in the past, so much Hailou Heavenly Gold was enough to make the Void Whale Overlord excited, but now I feel that this is it.

And the Void Whale Overlord also took out some Void Silver Water and handed it to Ye Tian, completing this transaction.

After this transaction was completed, Ye Tian left directly.

And the Void Whale Overlord said thoughtfully: "Last time, I used Hailou Gold to trade Hailou Tianjin, and this time I used Void Silver Water to trade Void Gold Water, this outsider or the force behind him has a special means to turn Hailou Gold into Hailou Heavenly Gold, and Void Silver Water into Void Gold Water?"

No one is stupid, and this perverse behavior naturally leads to his speculation.

But without understanding, he didn't dare to deal with Ye Tian rashly.

"Forget it, you still can't take risks, there is very likely to be an extremely powerful force behind this outsider, and there is no need to do it for the sake of a little conjecture. It's better to follow this kind of transaction, it will also help me, and I also have the hope of becoming a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage!" said the Void Whale Overlord secretly.

......

"I'm afraid this Void Whale Overlord has guessed, but so what, does he dare to make a move? Even if he does, he probably won't be able to beat me!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he didn't panic at all!

"Let's start fusing these Void Silver Waters!"

Ye Tian placed a cloud of Void Silver Water in front of him, and then urged the ability to fuse all things with the ability to copy the talent.

Airplanes!!!

These Void Silver Water began to melt, and after only fusing with the Eighteen Regiments, the Void Silver Water turned into Void Gold Water.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Soon after, he fused all the Void Silver Water he had obtained from the transaction and obtained some Void Gold Water.

"Although there is not much Void Gold Water, it is enough for the next transaction, at least I can make the Void Whale Overlord believe that I have a large amount of Void Gold Water. As for the price, it will be fixed for one hundred groups of Void Silver Water for one Void Gold Water, such a low price, I believe that the Void Whale Overlord will definitely be willing!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, the Void Whale Overlord would definitely not price it so low, but he didn't care how he set the price.

As long as the Void Whale Overlord can get enough Void Silver Water, that's fine.

After all, if he wants to earn, he also needs the Void Whale Overlord to earn some, so that he can maintain a long-term transaction.

After another period of time, Ye Tian contacted the Void Whale Overlord again and met in the old place.

......

"Void Whale Overlord, this is fifty regiments of Void Gold Water, and the price I gave you is five thousand regiments of Void Silver Water, do you want them all?" Ye Tian said.

"It's really Void Golden Water!"

The Void Whale Overlord's pupils shrank, and he was quite excited in his heart, eager to snatch it immediately, but after thinking about it carefully, he still forgot it.

"I don't have that much Void Silver Water, let's trade ten Void Gold Water first!"

The Void Whale Overlord said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded and agreed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian completed the transaction with the Void Whale Overlord.

And after the Void Whale Overlord completed the transaction, he immediately went to find other overlords, and he had to find a way to get the Void Silver Water of the other overlords.
